name: Use of Password Hash Instead of Password for Authentication
description: The product stores password hashes but accepts and compares client-supplied hashes for authentication, allowing attackers who obtain stolen hashes via SQL injection or data breach to authenticate directly without knowing the original password.
detection_pattern: INGRESS[client_hash] is compared directly against STORAGE[stored_hash] at AUTH[authentication] without a TRANSFORM[server_side_hashing] step that hashes the raw password on the server, making the hash functionally equivalent to a plaintext password
